treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 15 mL PO prior to admission and monitoring for titration to three bowel movements daily
Stent placement in one of the coronary arteries
treatment_information.treatment_response: Successful procedure; to continue with Clopidogrel and Aspirin

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted due to neck pain and confusion
Lactulose administered, leading to mental status improvement
Cardiac catheterization performed with stent placement
Discharge instructions provided, including follow-up appointments

patient_outcome.final_status: Clear and coherent but occasionally slow to respond
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Needs INR checked and follow up with PCP
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Medication regimen ongoing, potential for monitoring required due to stent
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Mental status improved following lactulose treatment
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient was pleased with care received in the hospital
